brief: Spotlight Fissure Keeper — Support from the Kronos realm. Highlight ability: Crystalline Trap.

image.prompt: 1:1 square aspect ratio, dark fantasy digital painting of a crystalline sentinel creature made of jagged obsidian and glowing blue ice, standing in a desolate rocky chasm, freezing fog swirling around its feet, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, highly detailed, TCG card art style, sharp focus.
